# UFO — Release 01 — manifest of all assets

#
# WARNING: war.gov is Akamai-protected — plain wget/curl gets HTTP 403.
# To bulk-download these, run the included download.py (uses curl_cffi to
# impersonate Chrome's TLS fingerprint).
